reviews.name: Paula Fernandez
reviews.text: Working with Sofia and her team was a fantastic experience. We were on a very strict timeline, but they managed to deliver a high-quality corporate video in record time. Their attention to detail, speed, and communication were excellent.

reviews.name: Jesse Kim
reviews.text: I couldn't complete my Netflix original series project well without the Viven AG team. They have a great team vibe, flexibility and great attitude. I believe it all came from Sebastian's leadership.

reviews.name: Anne-Catherine Völkers
reviews.text: We worked with Capgemini Switzerland on a client success story video with Viven AG and were really satisfied. We appreciated the professional, structured way of their work, their spontaneous availability and fast execution. We can for sure recommend Viven AG!

reviews.name: Manuela Kleiner
reviews.text: Working with the entire Viven team is simply a pleasure. Their professionalism, reliability, expertise and the final result are all perfect. We've been working with Viven for several years and already look forward to the next SENSAI Beauty project.

reviews.name: Thomas Stämpfli
reviews.text: Viven consulted on and executed most professionally our explainer video for TomFit. They delivered in time and in budget. It was truly a pleasure to work with them.

reviews.name: Young Suh
reviews.text: I brought my team of 70 to film a Korean TV series for 5 days, and Sebastian helped make it happen. He went above and beyond — Switzerland suddenly felt approachable, even with its high production costs.

reviews.name: SV Group
reviews.text: VIVEN supported us in the development and production of a corporate video on digitalization in the hospitality industry. We are absolutely delighted with the results and would work with VIVEN again at any time.

reviews.name: Péter Fankhauser
reviews.text: Super friendly, very flexible and professional team with excellent results for our product release video. I can highly recommend Viven and we'll definitely work with them again in the future!

reviews.name: Young-il Lee
reviews.text: I had an amazing time working with Sebastian and his team in Switzerland on a Netflix series. He's a master at supporting teams and making things run smoothly. His hospitality and genuine kindness absolutely blew me away.

reviews.name: Vlad Gheorghiu
reviews.text: The Viven team produced a very professional testimonial video which exceeded our expectations. They communicate professionally and went above and beyond to understand our needs.

reviews.name: Tristan Piguet
reviews.text: We worked with VIVEN to produce an international 45-minute documentary on robotics. The crew was very professional and kind, and the storytelling and all the technical details were perfectly handled.

reviews.name: Alba Guillen
reviews.text: We worked with Viven to produce videos and photos for our rebranding and the result was really nice. The team is so professional and they understand what you need from the very beginning. I really recommend them.

reviews.name: John McGinty
reviews.text: I've worked with Sebastian and team a couple of times and on both occasions it has been a pleasure! A super friendly team who create stunning visuals. Always my first port of call when I need a film crew in Switzerland.

reviews.name: Alexander Stauch
reviews.text: From the concept to the shooting days to the production of breathtaking videos, Viven offers an absolutely ingenious complete package that meets the highest standards. And working with Sebastian and his team is extremely fun.

reviews.name: Ignacio Delgado Muerza
reviews.text: Super professional, hard-working team — multilingual and talented creative filmmakers. It was a pleasure to work with Sebastian and the entire Viven crew on several projects in Zurich.

reviews.name: Marie Obien
reviews.text: Sebastian and the entire team are very professional, responsive, and really great to work with. Our video projects are all very well done and even exceeded our expectations.

reviews.name: Annaliza Savage
reviews.text: I found VIVEN for a last-minute shoot near Zurich. Very professional crew! I loved working with Sebastian — VIVEN really went above and beyond. Definitely recommend.

reviews.name: Kajsa Hansson
reviews.text: Always a pleasure working with Viven for my company's productions. Sebastian, our point of contact, is super responsive, flexible and accommodating. We're always more than happy with the final videos!

reviews.name: Porsche Zentrum Basel
reviews.text: We would like to thank the Viven team again for their outstanding work. It's always a pleasure — we're already looking forward to future productions.
